report.summary: UX audited and polished today's two build-cycle pages (Decentralized GPU Compute Guide 2026, Cross-chain Interoperability Guide 2026). Created OG images for both, added mobile table scroll hints, and implemented hover states for related article links.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added mobile scroll hint ('Scroll →') for comparison tables on both pages — appears on screens <768px, hidden on desktop
Added hover/focus transition states for related article links on both pages (background highlight, border accent, subtle lift animation)
Both pages already had good accessibility: focus-visible outlines, aria-labels on tables and breadcrumbs, semantic HTML structure
Both pages use responsive grid layouts (repeat(auto-fit, minmax(...))) and clamp() for fluid typography — mobile layout verified as solid
Table overflow containers already had overflowX: auto and WebkitOverflowScrolling: touch — now enhanced with visual scroll indicator
Identified that both pages use inline breadcrumbs rather than the shared Breadcrumb component (minor inconsistency, not blocking)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-decentralized-gpu-compute-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with GPU utilization bars, key stats (market size, cost savings, total GPUs), protocol pills (Render/Akash/io.net/Aethir), brand gradient title

OG image: og-cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with chain connection diagram (ETH/SOL/ARB/OP/AVAX/BASE nodes with hub), key stats (LayerZero volume, chains connected, TPS target), six protocol pills

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/decentralized-gpu-compute-guide-2026 — 745 lines, 8 sections + FAQ, comparison table, protocol cards, use case grid. UX: solid. Enhanced with scroll hint and link hover states.
/learn/cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026 — 743 lines, 9 sections + FAQ, comparison table (6 protocols), verification model cards. UX: solid. Enhanced with scroll hint and link hover states.

sections.title: Notes
items: Several other recent pages still missing OG images: megaeth-guide-2026, nftfi-nft-finance-guide-2026, story-protocol-ip-tokenization-guide, solana-blinks-actions-guide-2026, bitcoin-supply-shock-guide-2026 — recommend creating these in next design cycle
Cross-chain page has a legacy OG file og-cross-chain-interop-guide.svg with different naming — new file matches the metadata URL pattern correctly
